summary: Verified bug fixes for DOMMMA real estate platform: 1) 'Our Story' section removed from homepage, 2) 'Featured Listings' header text is now compact, 3) Payments page has single sidebar for Renter/Contractor, 4) Email verification endpoint works correctly. All 7 frontend E2E tests passed (1 skipped), all 13 backend tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test_renter@example.com user for authentication tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified successfully. The main fixes tested were: 1) Homepage no longer has large 'Our Story' image section - team founders are shown in horizontal grid, 2) Featured Listings header uses smaller text-xl/2xl instead of text-3xl/4xl, 3) Payments page uses single DashboardLayout wrapper from App.js (no duplicate sidebar), 4) Email verification endpoint returns proper errors for invalid/missing tokens.

Our_Story_Section_Removed.notes: Homepage team section shows founders in horizontal grid without large 'Our Story' image
Our_Story_Section_Removed.test: bug-fixes-verification.spec.ts - Homepage loads without 'Our Story' large image section

Featured_Listings_Header_Compact.notes: Header uses text-xl/text-2xl classes (compact), shows 'Discover Your Next Home'
Featured_Listings_Header_Compact.test: bug-fixes-verification.spec.ts - Featured Listings header is compact

Payments_Single_Sidebar.notes: Payments.jsx no longer wraps content in DashboardLayout - App.js already provides it
Payments_Single_Sidebar.test: bug-fixes-verification.spec.ts - Payments page has single sidebar

Email_Verification_Endpoint.notes: GET /api/auth/verify-email returns proper 400 error for invalid tokens
